subcodes.title: Words to Mountfort Mills, spoken around 1909-05-26
subcodes.first_line: Assisting one another and promoting unity and solidarity. These little troubles must not take up your time.
subcodes.subjects: @the economic problem and its solution; voluntary giving, @wealth inequality and its moderation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @conduct in finance and business, @House of Justice, @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @generosity [kirama], @education of children; moral education
